column3: I think; it seems; probably; right?

column5: これはどうやって使いますか。

column3: to not be (am not; is not; are not)

column3: until; as far as; to (an extent); even ~
column5: ここからそこまでは遠いですよ。

column3: would you; do you want to; shall we ~

column3: shall I ~; used to offer help to the listener

column3: sentence ending particle; confirmation; admiration; etc

column3: without doing ~; to do [B] without doing [A]
column5: 彼女はカサを持たないで出てしまった。
column6: She left without bringing an umbrella.

column3: destination particle; in; at; on; to

column1: の中で[A]が一番（のなかで[A]がいちばん）
